title: Food security - Canada.ca
content:
Discover how Canada determines food security status. Also learn about the Household Food Security Survey Module used to measure food security status.

## Services and information

### Household food insecurity in Canada: Overview
Definitions of food security and household food insecurity, how it is measured

### Household Food Security Survey Module
How the Household Food Security Survey Module asks about the food security situation in the household over the past 12 months

### Determining food security status
The different categories of food security and how we determine this status
